join_page.heading: fr Welcome to 8th Wall
join_page.invited_by_workspace: fr You've been invited to join the workspace <1>{{workspace}}</1> on 8th Wall!
join_page.invited_by_us: fr You've been invited to join us on 8th Wall!
email_verification_free_trial_page.blurb: fr To confirm your email address, enter the verification code in the email we just sent to <1>{{userEmail}}</1>
register_free_trial_page.meta.title: fr Sign Up for Web AR
register_free_trial_page.meta.descriptio: fr Create, collaborate and publish interactive augmented reality content to the web in real time with 8th Wall. Start developing now with a 14-day free trial.
register_free_trial_page.look_has_accoun: fr Looks like you already have an account with us! <1>Log in »</1>
register_free_trial_page.enterprise_plan: fr Brands and organizations interested in an Enterprise plan, <1>Contact Sales</1>
register_free_trial_page.already_has_acc: fr Already have an account? <1>Log in</1>
register_free_trial_page.register_form.t: fr I agree to the <1>Terms and Services</1> and confirm I have read the <3>Privacy Policy</3>. <5>*</5>
register_free_trial_page.register_form.c: fr I would like to receive the latest news and updates regarding 8th Wall.
register_free_trial_page.register_form.v: fr Password does not fit requirements
fr Password confirmation does not match
fr Please double-check your phone number
register_free_trial_page.register_free_t: fr Founder & President of Rose Digital

fr “Using the cloud editor our team was able to collaborate from asset updates to lighting tweaks to coding transitions. Removing the need to manage CI/CD and infrastructure enabled our engineering team to focus on doing what they do best, building beautiful, photorealistic immersive experiences that engage and delight users.”
register_free_trial_page.validate_input_: fr Please enter a valid email address
fr Please enter your email in lowercase
billing_free_trial_page.trial_promises.l: fr <0>Pay {{initialCharge}}</0> now. Set up payment for later.
fr We'll <1>email you 3 days before</1> your trial ends as a reminder
